hero.description: The education system stops at graduation. PathSaga starts there. Map your unique strengths to the right career, get a step-by-step roadmap, and navigate with

landing.hero_desc: PathSaga uses AI to match your unique strengths and interests to the right career — then builds a step-by-step roadmap to get you there.

footer.brand_desc: AI-powered career clarity for every student and professional.

problem.title: Why most career advice misses the mark
problem.p1_desc: Most students finish education without knowing which career actually fits their personality and strengths.
problem.p2_desc: One-size-fits-all guidance ignores what makes each person unique — and sets them up to feel stuck.
problem.p3_desc: Thousands of career paths, endless online advice, and no way to filter what truly applies to you.

features.title: Everything you need to move forward
features.f1_desc: A structured quiz that maps your strengths, values, and personality to real career categories.
features.f2_desc: Intelligent analysis surfaces the careers with the highest alignment to your unique profile.
features.f3_desc: Pinpoints exactly which skills you need to develop and prioritises them by impact.
features.f4_desc: Phase 1: Foundation. Phase 2: Build. Phase 3: Launch. A clear, staged plan tailored to your starting point.
features.f5_desc: Ask questions, get guidance, and receive coaching through a natural conversational interface.

how_it_works.title: How PathSaga works
how_it_works.subtitle: From zero clarity to a confident, personalised direction.
how_it_works.s1_desc: Sign up in seconds and tell us a bit about your education and background.
how_it_works.s2_desc: Answer a focused set of questions about your interests, values, and working style.
how_it_works.s3_desc: AI analyses your profile and shows you the careers that align most with who you are.
how_it_works.s4_desc: Receive a 3-phase action plan with milestones, resources, and tasks — built for your journey.

why.title: Why PathSaga is different
why.p5: Works for school and college students

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.a1: The core assessment, career matching, and roadmap are completely free to use.
faq.a2: School students, college students, and early-career professionals who want clarity on their career direction.
faq.q3: How does the career matching work?
faq.a3: Our AI analyses your assessment answers across multiple dimensions — interests, values, working style — and surfaces careers that align with your profile.
faq.a4: Yes. You can retake anytime, and your roadmap will update based on your new answers.
faq.a5: Your data is stored securely and never shared with or sold to third parties.

cta.desc: Start your free assessment — no credit card, no commitment.

auth.login_hero_desc: Access your personalized roadmap and continue your journey toward career clarity.
auth.login_welcome_desc: Sign in to continue your journey
auth.signup_subtitle: Free to use. No credit card needed.
auth.terms: By signing up you agree to our Terms & Privacy Policy.
auth.err_general: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's your career dashboard.
dashboard.prompt_desc: Answer a few questions to unlock your personalised career match and roadmap.
dashboard.fit_empty_desc: Complete the assessment to get your personalised career match.
dashboard.gap_empty: No skill gaps identified yet. Complete your assessment first.
dashboard.roadmap_empty: Your roadmap will appear here after assessment.
dashboard.tasks_empty: Tasks will appear based on your roadmap.

dashboard_new.no_roadmap_desc: You haven't taken the career assessment yet. Complete it to generate your personalized step-by-step roadmap.
dashboard_new.generating_tasks: AI Coach is generating exactly 10 tasks...
dashboard_new.phase_completed_desc: You have completed all {{total}} tasks for Phase {{phase}}. You're ready to proceed to the next phase.

aichat.title: Talk with our AI
aichat.desc: Get instant feedback, brainstorm career paths, or ask specific questions about your skills and roadmap.
aichat.plh_ask: Ask me anything about your career...

notfound.title: Page not found
notfound.desc: You've wandered off the path. Let's get you back on track.

onboarding.s1_sub: Tell us about your current studies
onboarding.s3_sub: Choose how you want to continue

data.q1: How do you prefer to work?
data.q1o4: Varies — I adapt to what's needed
data.q2: What kind of problems do you enjoy solving most?
data.q2o1: Technical or analytical problems with clear solutions
data.q2o2: Creative problems with many possible answers
data.q2o4: Strategic problems about systems and organisations
data.q3: What motivates you most in a career?
data.q3o1: Making a measurable impact on people's lives
data.q4: What work environment suits you best?
data.q4o1: Fast-paced startup with lots of change
data.q5: Which of these best describes your strongest skill?
data.q6: How do you feel about uncertainty and risk?
data.q6o1: I thrive in ambiguity — it excites me
data.q6o2: I'm okay with some risk if the reward is clear
data.q6o3: I prefer stability but can handle change
data.q6o4: I work best with predictability and structure
data.q7: How do you want to spend most of your working hours?
data.chat_msg_1: Hi! I'm your PathSaga AI career coach. How can I help you build your future today?
data.chat_msg_ai: That sounds like a solid plan. Have you considered exploring tech combinations with your current skill set to stand out?
